11.title: API Reference
11.content:
API Reference


.technical-documentation > h1 { display: none !important }
The following documentation is also available in these formats:


OpenAPI JSON
OpenAPI YAML
Swagger UI

API Reference v1.0






/sentence/{crn}

get

  Display the most recent ‘Active Event’ 




Parameters


ParameterInTypeRequiredDescription




crn
path
string
true











Responses


StatusDescriptionSchema




200

OK



{
  "sentences": [
    {
      "offence": {
        "offence": {
          "description": "string",
          "count": "integer"
        },
        "dateOfOffence": "string",
        "notes": "string",
        "additionalOffences": [
          {
            "description": "string",
            "count": "integer"
          }
        ]
      },
      "conviction": {
        "sentencingCourt": "string",
        "responsibleCourt": "string",
        "convictionDate": "string",
        "additionalSentences": [
          {
            "length": "integer",
            "amount": "integer",
            "notes": "string",
            "description": "string"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ]
}
